name: Esther Povitsky
bio: Esther Povitsky is an American stand-up comedian, actress, writer, and producer from the Chicago area. She co-created and starred in the series Alone Together and played Izzy in the Hulu series Dollface. Her comedy is built on a girlish, self-aware persona and personal storytelling.

timeline.ev: Co-creates and stars in the Freeform series Alone Together
Begins her run as Izzy on the Hulu series Dollface
Releases debut special Hot for My Name on Comedy Central

bits.t: Esther Is Hot For Her Name
